cases.input: Run session end cleanup for this branch after all local validations passed and prepare the PR handoff.
cases.expected_behavior: Produce all required closeout sections, cite validation commands, mark PR as pending, and provide next handoff.

cases.input: Close this agent session; no files were changed but decisions and risks were discussed.
cases.expected_behavior: Produce a no-change closeout without inventing files changed, and capture decisions, risks, and next action.

cases.input: End the session; one required validation failed with exit 1.
cases.expected_behavior: Block completion, name the failed command, preserve the failure in risks, and avoid marking tasks complete.

cases.input: Close the session after the PR was squash merged and the branch was deleted.
cases.expected_behavior: Record PR, CI, merge, branch cleanup, and main update evidence before declaring completion.

cases.input: Summarize the session, but I did not say whether tasklog or changelog may be edited.
cases.expected_behavior: Return proposed durable updates rather than writing logs, and mark authority as open.

cases.input: Finish cleanup, but git status shows an unrelated modified file outside the active scope.
cases.expected_behavior: Pause before durable writes and identify the unrelated local change as a blocker.

cases.input: Clean up temporary files in my downloads folder.
cases.expected_behavior: Do not activate; route to filesystem housekeeping rather than agent session closeout.

cases.input: End the session: one note says CI passed, another says CI failed.
cases.expected_behavior: Preserve both claims, mark the conflict, and block any green merge claim until evidence is resolved.

cases.input: Close a long multi-hour session with many commands, decisions, and follow-up tasks.
cases.expected_behavior: Compress into stable sections, prioritize open blockers, and keep next handoff actionable.

cases.input: Validate a JSON session cleanup report fixture offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid fixtures and reject reports missing validation evidence or evidence tags.
